effect.subject: Sunshine (#faa31b) / Gold (#ffc60a) in charts
effect.reserved_for: emphasis on key figures/data points only

rule_text: In charts, Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) are reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.
intent: Preserve warm accents as emphasis signals, not general fills.
summary: Use Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) only for emphasis on key figures/data points in charts.
